name: Geodesy

unions.name: CoordinateSystem
unions.comment: A CoordinateSystem can be Geocentric, Geographic or Projected.

aliases.name: Coordinate
aliases.comment:
A Coordinate is represented by three Float values.

    Geocentric: X Y Z
    Geographic: Longitude Latitude Height
    Projected East North Height

aliases.name: CoordinateReferenceSystem
aliases.comment:
A CoordinateReferenceSystem is defined by its coordinate system and
geodetic datum.

aliases.name: Datum
aliases.comment: A (geodetic) datum is represented by a Spheroid and a Transformation.

aliases.name: Projection
aliases.comment:
A Projection is represented by its conversion from and to geographic
coordinate on a specific spheroid.
aliases.type: { toGeographic : Geodesy.Spheroid -> Geodesy.Coordinate -> Geodesy.Coordinate, fromGeographic : Geodesy.Spheroid -> Geodesy.Coordinate -> Geodesy.Coordinate }

aliases.name: Spheroid
aliases.comment: A Spheroid is represented by its major axis and inverse flattening.

aliases.name: Transformation
aliases.comment:
A Transformation is represented by its transformation from and to
WGS84 geocentric coordinates.
aliases.type: { toWGS84 : Geodesy.Coordinate -> Geodesy.Coordinate, fromWGS84 : Geodesy.Coordinate -> Geodesy.Coordinate }

values.name: convert
values.comment:
Coordinate conversion for coordinate systems in the same geodetic
datum.

values.name: transform
values.comment:
Coordinate transformation for coordinate systems with different geodetic
datum.

values.name: webMercator
values.comment: The WebMercator projection is used by many web maps (like google).

values.name: wgs84
values.comment:
WGS84 is represented by a WGS84 Spheroid. All transformations are defined
relative to WGS84.
